title: Minimum Consecutive Cards to Pick Up
titleCn: 必须拿起的最小连续卡牌数

testcases.input: cards = [3,4,2,3,4,7] Output: 4 Explanation: We can pick up the cards [3,4,2,3] which contain a matching pair of cards with value 3. Note that picking up the cards [4,2,3,4] is also optimal.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: We can pick up the cards [3,4,2,3] which contain a matching pair of cards with value 3. Note that picking up the cards [4,2,3,4] is also optimal.

testcases.input: cards = [1,0,5,3] Output: -1 Explanation: There is no way to pick up a set of consecutive cards that contain a pair of matching cards.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: There is no way to pick up a set of consecutive cards that contain a pair of matching cards.
